testcase.name: test_create_product_rolls_back_on_a_duplicate_row
testcase.system-out:
WordPress database error: [Duplicate entry 'B0PSCRDUP1-UK' for key 'wptests_apt_products.asin_region']
INSERT INTO `wptests_apt_products` (`asin`, `region`, `custom_category`, `images`, `facts`, `is_active`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `created_by`) VALUES ('B0PSCRDUP1', 'UK', NULL, '[]', '{\"title\":\"Fresh Title\"}', '1', '2026-07-14 18:48:52', '2026-07-14 18:48:52', '47')
